ports.name: RIO Ethernet
ports.note: 10/100 Mbps. This port can also receive passive PoE (4.5-19V) as an alternative power input to the Weidmuller terminal — power is accepted on the PoE pins of the RJ45.

ports.name: AUX2 PoE Power Output
ports.note: Active only when the aux2PoeEnabled property is true (DIP switch on device). Shares the AUX2 RJ45 physical jack with aux2-eth — power is delivered on the PoE pins of the same connector. Output voltage is unregulated passthrough of the radio's input voltage.

ports.name: AUX1 PoE Power Output
ports.note: Active only when the aux1PoeEnabled property is true (DIP switch on device). Shares the AUX1 RJ45 physical jack with aux1-eth — power is delivered on the PoE pins of the same connector. Output voltage is unregulated passthrough of the radio's input voltage.

ports.name: DS Ethernet
ports.note: 10/100/1000 Mbps (gigabit). No PoE capability on this port.
